Dashboard Archive: 2026-05-27 Home
About This Dashboard
What It Does
Short-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns (1d to 1y), SMA gate (above 30/50/100/200 day), ratio consistency across timeframes, and resilience on bad SPY days. Higher composite scores indicate stronger, more consistent short-term momentum.
Today's Reading
# Market Analysis: Momentum-Ranker Dashboard Today's data shows two exceptionally strong performers dominating the momentum rankings. VPG ranks #1 with a composite score of 97.6, driven by extraordinary gains across all timeframes (384.49% over 1 year, 304.5% over 6 months) and perfect technical positioning above all four major moving averages. ELA follows closely with comparable 1-year performance (328.8%) and similarly clean technicals, though with somewhat more moderate ratio consistency scores. Both tickers demonstrate the dashboard's key strength criteria: they massively outpace SPY across 1-week to 1-year horizons (VPG by 26-354 percentage points depending on timeframe), maintain low correlation to economic downturns (bad_spy_scores of 3.29 and 1.51 respectively), and show confirmed volatility patterns. The data suggests these are rare cases where momentum, technical health, and resilience align across multiple dimensions—though such extreme outlier performance raises questions about sustainability and typical market conditions for the broader 700-ticker universe.
For educational and informational purposes only. Not financial advice. Past performance does not guarantee future results.
